Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Premier Healthcare Alliance LP's Motion For Attorney Fees And Expenses is granted. No opposition filed. Premier Health Care Alliance is awarded attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $71,801.96 against Kjell Bomark-Noel. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ADAM S. CASHMAN OF THE SINGER & BEA LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-481-0889 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PREMIER HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE LLP;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PREMIER HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE L.P.'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS is DENIED in its entirety. Although the motion is not opposed, it must still be denied because the motion does not comply with the requirements of CCP 128.5, the sole asserted basis for the motion. CCP 128.5(f) states that a 128.5 motion must comply with the grace period requirements of CCP 128.7 before a motion for sanctions may be brought. There is no indication in the motion papers that defendant so complied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
